Ghana • Ghanaian and seafood

Oasis Beach Resort Restaurant

Cape Coast dining is casual and practical. Oasis works as a traveler-friendly stop after castle touring or before a Kakum day.

★ 4.2 274 reviews
Image slot Restaurant Oasis Beach Resort Restaurant

About this restaurant

Cape Coast dining is casual and practical. Oasis works as a traveler-friendly stop after castle touring or before a Kakum day.

Signature dish

Grilled fish, jollof rice, and casual beachfront meals

Practical information

Service pace can be relaxed. Build in time rather than squeezing it between guided tours.

Nearby attraction

This restaurant is recommended for travelers visiting Cape Coast & Kakum.

External booking

$$

Cape Coast beachfront
